BallisLife

Selected photos from my basketball journey (in chronological order):

  1. 2016 Shenzhen Middle School Basketball Cup (2nd place)

  1. 2017 UCSB CSSA Freshman Basketball Game (semi-final)

  1. 2017 Fall UCSB Intramural Basketball Game Group B (round of 16)

  1. 2018 Winter UCSB Intramural Basketball Game Group C (quarter-final)

  1. 2018 UCSB CSSA 3X3 Basketball Game (semi-final)
